---

```python
import requests
import json

# 搜索Redis许可证变更信息
def search_redis_license():
    queries = [
        "Redis license change 2024 RSPL RSAL",
        "Valkey open source fork Redis",
        "AWS ElastiCache Valkey support 2024",
        "Google Cloud Memorystore Redis alternative",
        "Valkey community roadmap migration"
    ]
    
    results = {}
    for q in queries:
        try:
            # 使用DuckDuckGo搜索API
            url = f"https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q={q.replace(' ', '+')}"
            r = requests.get(url, timeout=15, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
            results[q] = r.text[:3000] if r.status_code == 200 else f"Error: {r.status_code}"
        except Exception as e:
            results[q] = str(e)
    
    return results

# 执行搜索
data = search_redis_license()
print("=== SEARCH RESULTS ===")
for k, v in data.items():
    print(f"\n--- {k} ---")
    print(v[:1500])
```

```python
import requests
import json

# 搜索Redis许可证变更信息
def search_redis_license():
    queries = [
        "Redis license change 2024 RSPL RSAL",
        "Valkey open source fork Redis",
        "AWS ElastiCache Valkey support 2024",
        "Google Cloud Memorystore Redis alternative",
        "Valkey community roadmap migration"
    ]
    
    results = {}
    for q in queries:
        try:
            # 使用DuckDuckGo搜索API
            url = f"https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q={q.replace(' ', '+')}"
            r = requests.get(url, timeout=15, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
            results[q] = r.text[:3000] if r.status_code == 200 else f"Error: {r.status_code}"
        except Exception as e:
            results[q] = str(e)
    
    return results

# 执行搜索
data = search_redis_license()
print("=== SEARCH RESULTS ===")
for k, v in data.items():
    print(f"\n--- {k} ---")
    print(v[:1500])
```
